heroSubtitle: We help small businesses respond faster, organize requests, reduce errors and save hours of work every week.
solutionsSectionText: We don’t sell complicated technology. We solve repetitive tasks and slow processes.
benefitsSectionLabel: How COILNOVA Can Help Your Business
benefitsSectionTitle: How COILNOVA Can Help Your Business
benefitsSectionText: We help businesses save time, reduce costs and eliminate repetitive work through Automation and Artificial Intelligence.
benefit1Text: Automate repetitive tasks and focus on growing your business.
benefit2Text: Reduce manual work, minimize errors and improve operational efficiency.
benefit3Text: Create faster, more reliable and better organized business processes.
benefit4Text: Let automation handle repetitive work while your team focuses on customers and business growth.
benefit5Text: Integrate Email, WhatsApp, Google Sheets, Google Calendar and hundreds of other applications.
benefit6Text: Use AI to answer customers, organize information, generate documents and automate repetitive work.
service1Text: Receive, organize and automatically route new customer requests.
service2Text: Confirmations, reminders and follow-up to reduce no-shows and calls.
service3Text: Summaries, classification, reports and AI-assisted replies.
service4Text: Centralize information in Google Sheets, dashboards, CRM or databases.
service5Text: Send emails, internal alerts and automatic messages at the right time.
service6Text: Connect tools that today work separately and eliminate manual copy work.
beforeItem1: Requests scattered across email and WhatsApp
afterItem5: Team focused on what creates value
processStep1Text: We learn about your business, analyze your processes and identify automation opportunities.
processStep2Text: We design a solution tailored to your business and provide a personalized quotation with no obligation.
processStep3Text: We develop, test and deploy your automation while ensuring a smooth integration.
processStep4Text: We provide maintenance, improvements and ongoing support to keep everything running efficiently.
packagesSectionTitle: What Can We Automate for Your Business?
packagesSectionText: Every business is different. These are just some of the automation solutions we can build to simplify your daily operations.
automationCard1Text: Automatically receive bookings and sync them with your calendar to avoid conflicts and missed appointments.
automationCard2Text: Send confirmations, reminders and personalized replies automatically whenever a customer contacts you.
automationCard3Text: Generate and send professional quotations automatically after a customer fills out a form.
automationCard4Text: Receive daily, weekly or monthly reports with the most important information about your business.
automationCard5Text: Connect WhatsApp, Email, Google Sheets, Google Calendar and many other tools to work together automatically.
automationCard6Text: Automatically organize orders, customer requests and business information in one place.
automationCard7Text: Centralize information from multiple platforms while reducing manual work and human errors.
automationCard8Text: Use Artificial Intelligence to answer customer questions, classify requests, generate documents and automate repetitive tasks.
automationFinalText1: Can't find exactly what you need?
automationFinalText2: We develop custom automation solutions tailored to your business.
project1Text: Collect requests, organize them in Google Sheets and automatically send emails to the client and company.
project2Text: Workflow that analyzes data and automatically sends a personalized report to the lead.
project3Text: Scheduled system to collect information, analyze sentiment and update results automatically.
contactSectionTitle: Discover what you can automate in your company.
contactSectionText: Tell us briefly how you work. You will receive practical suggestions, no strings attached.
formLabelMessage: What would you like to automate?
formPrivacy: Your data will only be used to respond to the request.
contactDirectTitle: Prefer to talk to us directly?
contactResponseTime: We usually respond within 24 working hours.
